article_title: 单体架构在 C# 中的完整指南：从传统分层到模块化单体
core_theme: C# 单体架构的三种形态：传统分层 → 模块化单体 → 分布式单体反模式，以及用 internal 保护模块边界的实践路径
reader_takeaway: 分清三种单体形态，学会用接口解耦和 internal 关键字构建可维护的模块化单体
summary_angle: 从耦合混乱的传统单体进化到编译期强制边界的模块化单体

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文传统分层单体——OrderService 直接 new OrderRepository()，硬耦合无法测试
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：三个模块（订单/商品/用户）混在一起没有边界，箭头互相缠绕

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文使用 internal + 独立类库项目 + 接口契约保护模块边界
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：模块间出现清晰边界线，通过接口单向连接

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文模块化单体演进路径——未来提取为微服务时只是运维动作而非架构重写
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：三个独立模块整齐排列，各自接口清晰，模块名称可辨

main_metaphor: 从混乱的线团到有序的三块积木——模块化就是给每个部分画上清晰的边界
primary_subject: 三个代码模块从左到右演进：左侧混乱交织无边界，中间出现虚线边界和接口箭头，右侧变成三个整齐独立带清晰接口的模块
subject_action: 模块从混乱到有序的渐进演进过程
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；极简线稿的理性克制和边界清晰度适合表达架构模块化主题
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证从混乱耦合到清晰模块边界的三段演进叙事是否成立，三个中文标签是否可辨认
revision_targets: 模块结构不够清晰时强化边界线
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: C# monolith architecture evolution from chaotic tightly-coupled layered monolith to clean modular monolith with compiler-enforced boundaries.

Summary angle: From chaotic tangled modules without boundaries → clear interface contracts with internal boundaries → three clean independent modules ready for future extraction.
Narrative flow: before-after. 2.35:1 wide frame, one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Problem (left): three code modules (Order, Catalog, User) tangled together, no boundaries, arrows tangled — label '耦合'
- Mechanism (center): modules separated by dotted boundary lines, connected through one-way interface arrows — label '接口 + internal'
- Takeaway (right): three clean independent modules with clear interfaces, organized and extractable — label '模块化单体'

Main metaphor: Code blocks evolving from tangled yarn to clean organized building blocks with clear edges.
Subject: Three module blocks undergoing left-to-right transformation. Left: messy tangled blocks. Center: dotted boundaries emerging with interface arrows. Right: three clean separated module blocks with labeled interface ports.
Composition: Left-to-right horizontal progression, clean negative space.
Style: combine isometric conceptual systems scene with selected visual style descriptor: minimalist line-art illustration, sparse clean strokes, ample negative space, precise symbolic objects, limited accent color. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: warm gray, deep indigo accent, off-white background.
Visible text: only 3 Chinese labels: '耦合', '接口 + internal', '模块化单体'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake system architecture diagrams with real labels, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, neon buildings, robot poses, fake code editors, fake architecture node names with real project names, decorative clutter, cyberpunk lighting.
